crime.value: Poisoning murder of husband and housekeeper using spoiled mayonnaise; question: will Victoria's past crimes be discovered?
crime.quote: she had taken a jar of mayonnaise and had opened it and left it out to spoil, then had mixed it in with the fresh

victim.value: Victoria Andrews, murderer of her husband George and housekeeper Hortense; 'killable' because she killed others for money
victim.quote: now, he was dead and she was free, from the shriveled up old man. She couldn't believe how easy it had been

culprit_and_motive.value: Mr. Williams/Mr. Johnson and associates at fake 'Banatelli's' store; motive: justice/revenge for Dr. Reynolds and orphanage children
culprit_and_motive.quote: Well ,our client, Dr. Reynolds and the children at the orphanage will be pleased

resolution.value: Victoria dies from black widow spider bite delivered via package; perpetrators leave no evidence, disappear
resolution.quote: And since there in no such place as, Banatelli's ,there are no clues to lead them to us. All they will find is an empty

red_herring.value: Empty package with no contents - deliberate misdirection suggesting incomplete delivery rather than murder weapon
red_herring.quote: when they finally find her body and look in the box they will find nothing there, just an empty package

clue_fairness.value: Victoria's deadly spider allergy revealed to reader before the fatal package opening
clue_fairness.quote: she was allergic to spiders ,deadly allergic

social_world.value: Charitable institutions (orphanage) vs. wealthy widow - power dynamics around inheritance and social obligation
social_world.quote: our client, Dr. Reynolds and the children at the orphanage will be pleased

alibi.value: Assassination service operates from fake storefront with no traceable location
alibi.quote: since there in no such place as, Banatelli's ,there are no clues to lead them to us. All they will find is an empty warehouse

reveal_mechanic.value: Black widow spider hidden in packing material, exploiting victim's known deadly allergy
reveal_mechanic.quote: A small black widow spider. 'No!' 'No!' she screamed, she was allergic to spiders ,deadly allergic

_meta.title: ebook melinda dawn mardars satifaction guaranteed
